operational_knowledge_units.title: Robot Selection screen supports add and remove actions for robots
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Robot Selection / Add and Remove slide shows that users can add a robot by entering a corresponding robot ID and clicking Add, or remove a robot by entering a robot ID or selecting the robot and clicking Remove. The system provides success feedback for add and removal actions.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Robot Selection / Add and Remove'
Visible text: '1. Enter the corresponding robot ID'
Visible text: '3. The system will show that the adding was successful.'
Visible text: '1. Enter the corresponding robot Id or select the robot.'
Visible text: '3. The system will show that the removal'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robot Selection Add and Remove screen lets a user add a robot by entering the corresponding robot ID and clicking Add, then the system shows the adding was successful. It also lets a user remove a robot by entering the robot ID or selecting the robot, then clicking Remove, and the system shows removal feedback.

operational_knowledge_units.title: System shows success feedback after robot add or remove actions
operational_knowledge_units.summary: After an add action, the system shows that adding was successful. After a remove action, the system shows feedback indicating the removal result.
observed_evidence: Visible text: '3. The system will show that the adding was successful.'
Visible text: '3. The system will show that the removal'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: System behavior on Robot Selection add and remove actions includes showing success or completion feedback after adding a robot and showing removal feedback after removing a robot.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Add a robot in Robot Selection
preconditions: User is on the Robot Selection Add and Remove screen
The corresponding robot ID is available
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide-level screenshot for Robot Selection / Add and Remove with numbered steps for Add Robot and Remove Robot; add action references robot ID entry and Add button.

steps.observed_evidence: Visible text: '1. Enter the corresponding robot ID'
steps.visual_region_hint: Robot Selection add/remove area; robot ID input referenced by the Add Robot instructions
Add button in the Robot Selection add/remove area

steps.action: Verify the system shows that adding was successful.
steps.observed_evidence: Visible text: '3. The system will show that the adding was successful.'
steps.visual_region_hint: System feedback/message area associated with the add action

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Procedure to add a robot in Robot Selection: enter the corresponding robot ID, click Add, and verify the system shows the adding was successful.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Remove a robot in Robot Selection
preconditions: User is on the Robot Selection Add and Remove screen
A robot ID is known or the robot can be selected from the UI
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide-level screenshot for Robot Selection / Add and Remove with numbered steps for removal using either robot ID entry or robot selection, followed by Remove.

steps.action: Enter the corresponding robot ID or select the robot.
steps.observed_evidence: Visible text: '1. Enter the corresponding robot Id or select the robot.'
steps.visual_region_hint: Robot Selection add/remove area; robot ID input or robot selection control referenced by the Remove Robot instructions
Remove button in the Robot Selection add/remove area

steps.action: Verify the system shows removal feedback.
steps.observed_evidence: Visible text: '3. The system will show that the removal'
steps.visual_region_hint: System feedback/message area associated with the remove action

warnings: The slide text for the final removal confirmation appears truncated; exact feedback wording is not fully visible.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Procedure to remove a robot in Robot Selection: enter the corresponding robot ID or select the robot, click Remove, and verify the system shows removal feedback.
